response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical curiosity, and notable open-source contributions, but lacks clear evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms, AI-driven feature rollout systems, or cross-team measurement frameworks — core requirements for this Principal IC role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages including TypeScript, DLang, and C++
Proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools with real-world usage
Strong emphasis on testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling — aligns with engineering excellence
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Lack of demonstrated leadership in multi-team, enterprise-scale architectural initiatives
Resume lacks metrics on scale, reliability, or impact of systems built (e.g., traffic, uptime, adoption)
